defaultComboState.description: Stab crits apply Exposed (3s). Next non-Stab skill consumes for +25% damage.

mechanics: Puncture stacks (T1a — consecutive hit stack builder, guaranteed crit at threshold)
Predator state (T2 notable — escalating on-hit proc, crit multiplier window)
Death Mark (T6 notable — catastrophic proc on crit, +100% burst on marked target)
nonTracked: +X% crit vs HP threshold — T3 conditional, no tracking needed
Predator state duration extension — T4b support, enhances tracked Predator state
Kill momentum — T3 conditional, passive CD reduction on kill

comboModifications.description: Exposed bonus increased from +25% to +40% while target has Vulnerable.

nodes.name: Puncture
nodes.description: Each consecutive Stab hit on the same target builds a Puncture stack (max 3). At max stacks: next Stab is a guaranteed crit. Stacks reset after the guaranteed crit fires.
nodes.rank2: Threshold reduced to 2 stacks. Guaranteed crit also gains +15% crit multiplier.
nodes.designNotes: STACK_BUILDER template. Stab is fast (3s CD) so 3 consecutive hits is ~9s of setup for a guaranteed crit. Rank 2 cuts to 6s — meaningful acceleration.

nodes.name: Tunnel Vision
nodes.description: +5% crit chance per consecutive Stab hit on the same target (max 4 stacks, +20%). Stacks persist through other skill casts. Resets on target death.
nodes.rank2: Bonus increases to +7% per stack (max +28%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: CONSECUTIVE_TARGET template. Stacks persist through other skills in rotation — only reset on target death. Both ranks are functional in auto-rotation. Rank 2 is a value upgrade, not a mechanic unlock.

nodes.name: Blade Sense
nodes.description: 10% chance on Stab hit to enter Predator state (+50% crit multiplier for 3s). Chance increases by 4% per consecutive Stab hit on the same target (max 30%). Resets to 10% on target switch.
nodes.designNotes: Escalating proc. Stab's fast hits make the 10%→30% ramp happen in ~4 casts. Rewards patient consecutive hitting.

nodes.name: Honed Instincts
nodes.description: After Stab crits: gain +4% crit multiplier for 2s. Refreshes on subsequent crits.
nodes.rank2: Duration extended to 3s. Bonus increases to +6% crit multiplier.
nodes.designNotes: Crit → crit multiplier feedback loop. Small per-instance but with Stab's fast cycle it's nearly permanent uptime.

nodes.name: Exploit Opening
nodes.description: +15% crit chance against targets below 50% HP.
nodes.rank2: Threshold raised to 60% HP. +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Simple conditional stat. Execute-adjacent — you crit more as targets get low. No proc tracking.

nodes.name: Kill Momentum
nodes.description: When Stab kills a target, its cooldown is reduced by 0.5s for the next cast.
nodes.rank2: Cooldown reduction increased to 1.0s. +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Kill chain accelerator. At rank 2, Stab's 3s CD becomes 2s after a kill. Simple, no proc, just faster.

nodes.name: Lethal Rhythm
nodes.description: +10% damage for each consecutive Stab hit on the same target (max 5 stacks, +50%). Resets on target death.
nodes.rank2: Stacks build on ANY Stab hit (not just consecutive), but max stacks reduced to 3 (+30%). +3% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Ramping conditional. Different from Tunnel Vision (crit chance) — this is flat damage. Rank 2 trades ceiling (5 stacks) for reliability (any hit builds stacks, not just consecutive). Still resets on target death.

nodes.name: Exploit Weakness
nodes.description: Stab crits apply Vulnerable curse (2s). While target is Vulnerable: Exposed bonus increased from +25% to +40%. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Gated proc. Gate is 'must crit' — which T1-T2 already help with. Enhances the Exposed combo state (combo modification). Vulnerable is a CURSE (from mechanics), not an ailment (from elements).

nodes.name: Predator's Focus
nodes.description: While Predator state is active: +15% damage with Stab.
nodes.rank2: +25% damage. Predator state duration extended by 1s.
nodes.designNotes: Support node for T2's Predator state. No new proc — just enhances the existing state window.

nodes.name: Precision Killer
nodes.description: Stab crits on Vulnerable targets have 30% chance to reset Stab's cooldown instantly (free cast). Your crit chance cannot exceed 60% (reliability ceiling). +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. Crit cap means you can't brute-force 100% crit — you rely on the 30% reset proc for bonus casts. Floor is high (reliable free Stabs), ceiling is capped.

nodes.name: Opportunist
nodes.description: When Stab kills a target: gain First Blood (+60% damage on next Stab against a NEW target, 10s). Stab deals -15% damage against targets hit 3+ times.
nodes.designNotes: Risky choice. Rewards kill chains (+60% on first hit) but punishes staying on tough targets (-15% after 3 hits). Anti-synergy with Tunnel Vision's sustained stacking. Great for pack clearing, terrible for bosses.

nodes.name: Death Mark
nodes.description: Stab crits have 15% chance to apply Death Mark (10s). The next hit against a Death Marked target deals +100% damage and consumes the mark. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Catastrophic proc. 15% on crit is roughly every 7th crit. When it fires, the NEXT skill to hit that target gets +100%. Naturally pairs with Assassinate (setup → huge burst). The mark lasts 10s so you have time to position your big skill.

nodes.name: DEATHBLOW
nodes.description: Stab becomes an execute-only finisher when target is below 25% HP: deals 500% weapon damage. Above 25% HP, Stab deals -20% base damage. Crits no longer deal bonus crit damage — crits ONLY deliver Death Marks.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 (Death Mark) makes crits apply a +100% mark. T7 removes crit bonus damage entirely — crits become ONLY a mark delivery mechanism. The 500% execute is the real damage, not crits. Transforms Stab from 'crit machine' to 'mark applier + execute finisher.'
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Blade Sense (T2) — Predator state's +50% crit mult has no value when crits don't deal bonus damage. Still useful for crit CHANCE (triggering Death Mark) but mult is wasted.
nodes.synergyNotes: Exploit Weakness (T4) gives reliable Vulnerable → more crits → more Death Marks. Precision Killer (T5A) gives free Stab resets → more crit attempts → more marks. Death Mark (T6) is the delivery mechanism T7 weaponizes.

mechanics: Ailment duration ramping (T1a — consecutive hits extend ailment duration, unique to Stab's fast cycle)
Toxic Burst (T2 notable — gated proc at 3+ ailment stacks, instant DoT burst)
Pandemic Cascade (T6 notable — on kill with ailments, spread all ailments to nearby + refresh)
nonTracked: +X% ailment potency vs stacked targets — T3 conditional, no tracking
Venom Frenzy extension — T4b support, enhances tracked Venom Frenzy state

comboModifications.description: Stab crits no longer create Exposed. Instead create Festering Mark (3s): next skill's ailment potency doubled.

nodes.name: Lingering Cuts
nodes.description: Each consecutive Stab hit on the same target extends active ailment duration by 0.3s (max +1.5s over 5 hits). Resets on target switch.
nodes.rank2: Extension increased to 0.5s per hit (max +2.5s). Also increases ailment potency by 3% per consecutive hit.
nodes.designNotes: NOT 'applies 1 poison on hit.' Instead, Stab's FAST CYCLE extends existing ailments. The element transform already applies the ailment — this node makes those ailments last longer through consecutive pressure. Unique to Stab because no other skill hits this frequently.

nodes.name: Toxic Momentum
nodes.description: +8% damage with Stab for each unique ailment type on the target (max 3 types, +24%). Different ailment types: bleed, poison, ignite, chill, shock.
nodes.rank2: +12% per unique ailment type (max +36%). Gain +5% attack speed while target has 2+ ailment types.
nodes.designNotes: Rewards DIVERSE ailment application. In a party or with multiple skills applying different elements, this ramps. Even solo, Stab's element + a secondary ailment from another skill gives +16-24%.

nodes.name: Toxic Burst
nodes.description: When Stab hits a target with 3+ ailment stacks: 25% chance to trigger Toxic Burst — instantly deal 50% of all active ailment damage as a single burst hit. +8% ailment duration.
nodes.designNotes: Gated at 3+ stacks — with T1a extending duration and the element transform applying ailments, this gate is reachable in ~3 Stab casts. The 50% instant burst makes ailment stacking feel immediately rewarding.

nodes.name: Festering Patience
nodes.description: While the target has an active ailment from Stab, Stab's ailment applications gain +10% potency.
nodes.rank2: +15% potency. Ailments applied by Stab also last 0.5s longer baseline.
nodes.designNotes: Self-reinforcing loop: Stab applies ailment → ailment is active → next Stab's ailment is stronger. Rewards maintaining ailment uptime.

nodes.name: Virulent Pressure
nodes.description: +20% ailment potency against targets with 5+ total ailment stacks.
nodes.rank2: Threshold reduced to 4+ stacks. +5% DoT multiplier.
nodes.designNotes: Conditional stat rewarding deep stacking. No proc, just stronger ailments when you've committed.

nodes.name: Infectious Rhythm
nodes.description: Stab crits create Festering Mark instead of Exposed (3s): next skill's ailment potency is doubled.
nodes.rank2: Festering Mark duration extended to 5s. Also increases next skill's ailment duration by 25%.
nodes.designNotes: COMBO MODIFICATION — replaces Exposed with Festering Mark. This is where Plague Stab diverges from Predator Stab. Instead of +25% damage for next skill, next skill's AILMENTS are doubled.

nodes.name: Relentless Infection
nodes.description: Ailments applied by Stab deal +8% more damage for each second they've been active (max +40% at 5s).
nodes.rank2: +10% per second (max +50%). Ailments that reach max bonus refresh their duration once.
nodes.designNotes: Rewards maintaining ailments over time — the longer they tick, the harder they hit. Rank 2's auto-refresh prevents expiry, creating 'eternal' pressure. Uniquely fits Stab because T1a extends duration.

nodes.name: Venom Frenzy
nodes.description: When Stab hits a target with 5+ ailment stacks: enter Venom Frenzy (5s). During Venom Frenzy: +30% attack speed and each Stab hit applies 1 additional ailment stack. 15s internal cooldown. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift at 5+ stacks. The 15s ICD prevents permanent uptime. During the 5s window, you're a machine — +30% speed + double ailment application. Build toward it, explode, then rebuild.

nodes.name: Frenzy Extension
nodes.description: While Venom Frenzy is active: +15% ailment potency with Stab.
nodes.rank2: +25% ailment potency. Each Stab hit during Venom Frenzy extends its duration by 0.3s (max +1.5s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for T4's Venom Frenzy. No new proc — just makes the frenzy window stronger and potentially longer.

nodes.name: Toxic Mastery
nodes.description: All ailments applied by Stab gain +10% potency per existing stack on the target (multiplicative). Ailment duration +25%. +10% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent choice. Every stack makes the next stack stronger — exponential scaling with a natural ceiling (target dies). Reliable, always-on value for sustained fights.

nodes.name: Volatile Toxins
nodes.description: When Stab hits a target with 8+ ailment stacks: 20% chance per hit to detonate ALL stacks — deal 100% of total stacked snapshot damage instantly. Resets stack count to 0.
nodes.designNotes: Risky choice. Massive burst potential (8+ stacks detonated at once) but resets all progress. Feast-or-famine. Anti-synergy with Toxic Mastery's sustained scaling. Great for pack clearing (detonate → move on), terrible for long boss fights (lose all stacks).

nodes.name: Pandemic Cascade
nodes.description: When Stab kills a target that has 3+ ailment stacks: all ailments spread to nearby enemies at 75% remaining duration. Spread ailments inherit Stab's potency bonuses. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Catastrophic kill proc. Kill with stacks → ailments jump to next target pre-loaded. Creates chain-clearing momentum where each kill pre-stacks the next target.

nodes.name: PLAGUE LORD
nodes.description: Stab can only apply ONE ailment type (your element's signature ailment). That ailment's EFFECT is tripled: DoT ailments (Bleed/Ignite/Poison) deal 3x damage, Chill applies 3x slow (60%), Shock applies 3x amp (24% per stack). Unlimited potency scaling. All other ailment types from Stab are disabled. -15% base Stab damage.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 (Pandemic Cascade) spreads ALL ailments on kill. T7 restricts you to ONE ailment type — so Pandemic only spreads one type, but that one type is 3x power. Tensions: breadth (T6 wants multiple ailment types for spread value) vs depth (T7 forces single type for raw power).
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Toxic Momentum (T1b) — bonus per unique ailment type on target. With only 1 ailment type, this maxes at +8-12% instead of +24-36%. Still functional but reduced.
nodes.synergyNotes: Lingering Cuts (T1a) extends the one ailment's duration. Relentless Infection (T3c) scales damage with ailment age. Toxic Mastery (T5A) per-stack potency scaling is multiplicative with 3x base — insane deep stacking.

mechanics: Evasive Stacking (T1a — each Stab grants dodge chance, builds defensive momentum)
Shadow Guard (T2 notable — reactive proc on dodge, counter-attack + Fortify)
Phantom Strike (T6 notable — dodge counter-attack that guarantees crit on next Stab)
nonTracked: +X% damage after dodge — T3 conditional, no tracking
Shadow Form bonuses — T4b support, enhances tracked Shadow Form state

comboModifications.description: Stab crits no longer create Exposed. Instead create Riposte Ready (3s): next dodge triggers a free Stab counter-attack.

nodes.name: Evasive Rhythm
nodes.description: Each Stab hit grants +2% dodge chance for 2s (max 3 stacks, +6%). Refreshes on each Stab hit.
nodes.rank2: +3% per stack (max +9%). Duration extended to 3s.
nodes.designNotes: Stab's fast cycle builds and maintains dodge chance stacks. At rank 2, 3 stacks = +9% dodge for 3s — nearly permanent with Stab's 3s CD. Creates a 'keep Stabbing to stay evasive' loop.

nodes.name: Combat Leech
nodes.description: Stab heals for 2% of damage dealt (life leech). +1 flat life on hit.
nodes.rank2: Leech increased to 4%. Life on hit increased to 3. While below 50% HP, leech doubled.
nodes.designNotes: Sustain foundation. Stab's fast cycle means frequent leech/life-on-hit ticks. Rank 2's below-50% doubled leech is a survival safety net.

nodes.name: Shadow Guard
nodes.description: When you dodge an attack: 60% chance to counter-attack for 75% of Stab's fully-scaled damage and gain 1 Fortify stack (3% damage reduction, 5s). 35% chance to reset Stab cooldown. +5% all resist.
nodes.designNotes: Reactive proc on dodge. Counter-attack + Fortify + CD reset. Creates the Ghost loop: Stab → build dodge stacks (T1a) → dodge → counter + Fortify + free Stab → repeat.

nodes.name: Reactive Footwork
nodes.description: After dodging: next Stab within 2s gains +15% damage.
nodes.rank2: +25% damage. Also applies to counter-attacks from Shadow Guard.
nodes.designNotes: Dodge → damage link. Rank 2 making it apply to Shadow Guard counters creates a dodge → empowered counter → empowered Stab chain.

nodes.name: Enduring Defense
nodes.description: +3% life leech while you have 2+ Fortify stacks.
nodes.rank2: +5% life leech. Also gain +5 all resist per Fortify stack.
nodes.designNotes: Sustain conditional tied to Fortify. Rewards maintaining defensive stacks with more sustain.

nodes.name: Riposte Ready
nodes.description: Stab crits create Riposte Ready (3s) instead of Exposed: next dodge triggers a free Stab counter-attack at 100% weapon damage.
nodes.rank2: Counter-attack deals 125% weapon damage. Riposte Ready duration extended to 4s.
nodes.designNotes: COMBO MODIFICATION — replaces Exposed with Riposte Ready. Ghost Stab's crit → dodge → free counter loop. Completely changes what you're building toward compared to Predator's Exposed.

nodes.name: Counter Momentum
nodes.description: +10% damage for 3s after dodging or blocking an attack.
nodes.rank2: +15% damage. Duration extended to 4s. Stacks up to 2 times (+30%).
nodes.designNotes: Simple offense-from-defense conditional. No proc tracking — just a damage window after defensive events.

nodes.name: Shadow Form
nodes.description: When you dodge 2 attacks within 4s: enter Shadow Form (4s). During Shadow Form: 30% damage reduction and all Stab hits apply Weakened curse (1s). 12s internal cooldown. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: State-shift requiring 2 dodges in 4s. With T1a granting dodge chance, this is achievable. Shadow Form is a powerful defensive window — 30% DR + Weakened on targets. 12s ICD prevents permanent uptime.

nodes.name: Shadow Persistence
nodes.description: While Shadow Form is active: +10% dodge chance.
nodes.rank2: +15% dodge chance. Each dodge during Shadow Form extends its duration by 0.5s (max +2s).
nodes.designNotes: Support for T4's Shadow Form. More dodge during shadow = more counter-attacks = more Fortify = longer shadow. Self-reinforcing defensive loop.

nodes.name: Evasive Recovery
nodes.description: Each dodge heals 3% of max HP. +10% of evasion added as flat damage to Stab. +5 all resist. +8% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Consistent sustain. Every dodge heals + evasion adds damage. High floor — you're always healing, always dealing damage from defensive stats. No variance.

nodes.name: Counter Stance
nodes.description: Dodge counter-attacks (from Shadow Guard and Riposte Ready) deal 150% of Stab's fully-scaled damage instead of 75-100%. Counter-attacks can crit. You take +10% increased damage from all sources.
nodes.designNotes: Risky offense-from-defense. Counter-attacks become your primary damage source — but you take 10% more damage. Glass cannon Ghost. Anti-synergy with the defensive identity but creates a unique 'dodge tank that kills through counters' build.

nodes.name: Phantom Strike
nodes.description: When you dodge: 20% chance to trigger Phantom Strike — an invisible counter-attack that deals 200% of Stab's fully-scaled damage and guarantees your next Stab crits. 8s internal cooldown. +5% weapon mastery.
nodes.designNotes: Catastrophic dodge proc. 200% weapon counter + guaranteed crit on next Stab. The guaranteed crit feeds back into T1's Puncture stacks and T2's Blade Sense/Predator procs if cross-specced. Dramatic 'you missed, now you die' moment.

nodes.name: SHADOW SOVEREIGN
nodes.description: All dodge counter-attacks (Shadow Guard, Riposte Ready, Phantom Strike) deal 200% of Stab's fully-scaled damage. Dodge proc frequency doubled. You can no longer heal from Stab (leech and life-on-hit disabled for this skill). -10% max HP.
nodes.tensionDescription: T6 (Phantom Strike) provides a powerful dodge counter. T7 doubles ALL counter damage and dodge proc frequency, but removes ALL healing from Stab. You become a dodge-counter killing machine that can't sustain — pure offense from defense, living on the edge.
nodes.antiSynergyNotes: Combat Leech (T1b) — completely disabled, wasted points. Evasive Recovery (T5A) — dodge healing still works (separate from Stab leech), but the 3% heal is less valuable with -10% max HP.
nodes.synergyNotes: Counter Stance (T5B) — counter crits + T7's 200% base = massive counter damage. Phantom Strike (T6) — doubled proc frequency + 200% base = frequent huge counters. Riposte Ready (T3b) — more counter sources feed the T7 damage machine.
